name: Agent Loop
description: Autonomous agent that loops between LLM and tools until task completion.

provides_nodes.name: Agent Loop
provides_nodes.description: Autonomous agent that loops between LLM and tools until no more tool calls.

provides_nodes.name: REPL Environment
provides_nodes.description: Initializes a persistent REPL state. Extracts user input from context and stores as prompt_var, building metadata-only system prompt. Foundation for RLM processing.

provides_nodes.name: Recursive LM
provides_nodes.description: Processes arbitrarily long inputs by treating the prompt as an environment variable. The LLM writes code to examine, decompose, and recursively process content beyond context window limits.
